examples: A new kind of soil infiltration measurement method in field, i. e., disc permeameter, was introduced in this paper.
This paper describes the principle and method of the permeameter testing as well as the related instrument and probe, and also described are the technical data obtained.
The breakthrough curves for heavy metals of solidification sludge were obtained by flexible-wall permeameter and the hydrodynamic dispersion parameters were acquired by genetic inverse method.
